name: account-information
notes: Each variant folder also carries `default.png` (raster export) next to vector `default.svg`.
`desktop-default` matches the in-app disclosure width (~640); `desktop-full-screen` is the wide desktop comp.

Mobile layout (Figma `452:89826`): content padding space/4 × space/3 (16×12px); section stack gap space/4 (16px) between summary, tabs, share bar, and each readonly TextField; each TextField min-height 88dp.
